queries.feature_definition: Credit history: all previous credits at this bank paid back duly.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of a credit history where all previous credits at this bank were paid back duly to increased credit default probability.
Statistical assessment of loan duration in months as a determinant contributing to decreased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigation into the impact of checking account status with no checking account on elevated credit risk drivers.
